title: 5 things a godly man puts to death before 25
caption:
What a godly man kills.

Not manages. Not improves. Kills.

Scripture doesn't say "work on your sin." It says put it to death (Colossians 3:5). The language is violent on purpose — sin doesn't negotiate, and neither should you.

Five things worth murdering before you're 25. Every one of them collects interest.

1. Porn. Name it, not just the category. Cut it off, not down.
2. Passivity. The man waiting for permission will always be led by whoever gives it.
3. The double life. Church you and 1 AM browser-history you are the same man. One of them needs to die.
4. Envy in disguise. You're calling it motivation. Check again.
5. Soft prayer. Telling God how hard it is — and never getting up. Lament is real. Wallowing is a choice.

Get up. The day has work in it.

—

Comment "death" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #godlymen #faithoverfear #manofgod #scripture #discipline #christianity #purity #integrity
